content.en:
Soon after, many Dao Ancestors discovered that the Worm King had disappeared.

Soon after, Black Wind Mountain sent Dao Ancestor to investigate, and found that the Worm King had really disappeared, and sent a large number of Dao Ancestors to kill the Forbidden Zerg lair again, killing the remaining Forbidden Zerg one by one, and the Forbidden Zerg was destroyed.

Once the Forbidden Insect Tree was destroyed, the Forbidden Zerg nest was not as strong as before, although it had not yet shattered.

Moreover, the Forbidden Zerg Lair has lost its previous ability to conceive, and there is no way to give birth to a new Forbidden Zerg.

Unless, after a long period of evolution, a new Forbidden Bug Tree is born inside the Forbidden Zerg Lair.

But the Xuanxu Ancient Realm will not allow this to happen, and will inevitably send a garrison here.

Black Wind Mountain moved quickly, and removed the valuable things inside the Forbidden Zerg Lair as soon as possible, and transformed it into a base here.

The movements of the Heavenly Emperor Palace were a little slower, after all, they didn't know that the Worm King had disappeared, and when the Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace entered the Forbidden Zerg Lair, it was just empty, there was nothing left, and even the Forbidden Insect Tree fragments had disappeared.

......

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

The Golden Crow Palace Lord, the Blue Dragon Palace Lord, the True Martial Palace Lord, the White Tiger Palace Lord, and many other palace masters are opening a meeting, and the content of the meeting is about the Worm King.

"Guys, have you found any news about the Worm King?"

The Golden Crow Palace Lord asked.

"I can't find it!" the Qinglong Palace Lord shook his head, "The Worm King disappeared suddenly, it stands to reason that the Worm King will continue to hunt us down, and it will be impossible to discard the Forbidden Zerg Lair!" I think Black Wind Mountain should know what happened to the Insect King, otherwise Black Wind Mountain wouldn't be so bold!"

"Could it be that the strong man of Black Wind Mountain killed the insect king?"

The White Tiger Palace Lord guessed.

Thinking of this possibility, the White Tiger Palace Lord and the other Palace Masters became worried.

After all, how powerful that Forbidden Insect King was, even the Golden Crow Palace Lord was not an opponent, it was the top second-step half-step domain ancestor combat power, that is, the top Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestor.

Such a powerful Forbidden Insect King, even the third-step half-step Domain Ancestor, the Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, would be difficult to kill it, if this Forbidden Insect King was given a little more time, it could increase its strength to the Returning Realm.

At that time, except for a few Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, only Domain Ancestors could kill it.

If Black Wind Mountain really killed this Forbidden Insect King, it meant that Black Wind Mountain at least had a half-step domain ancestor of the One Realm.

"It wasn't necessarily Black Wind Mountain that killed the Forbidden Insect King, maybe it was something else!" the Golden Crow Palace Lord hurriedly said.

He said so, but in fact, he was also worried in his heart.

On the surface, he is the strongest palace master of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, but in fact, the Heavenly Emperor Palace also has several ancient palace masters, who belong to the same group of ancient palace masters as the ancestors of the vast sea area.

The Vast Sea Ancestor was not the master of the Heavenly Emperor Palace at the beginning, and he also became strong step by step from weak, to the invincible Dao Ancestor, the half-step Domain Ancestor, and then to the Domain Ancestor level.

Strictly speaking, the Vast Sea Ancestor should be regarded as the second generation of Heavenly Emperors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and the first generation of Heavenly Emperors also had many ancient and powerful palace masters, several of whom were stronger than him.

It's just that after the Vast Sea Ancestor took charge of the Vast Sea Realm, those ancient palace masters traveled to the Divine Heaven Realm and the Dark Forbidden Realm.

Before the arrival of the Domain Realm Shattering War, those ancient palace masters also returned, and now they have also come to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, but they are still in a state of sleep, and they will not wake them up unless they have to.

And all of their strength is at the level of the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, which is the real Ten Thousand Things Realm, and it is not very far from the One Realm, and one of them is even comparable to the top Half Step Domain Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

But this ancient palace master can't kill that low-profile version of the Forbidden Insect King!

If Black Wind Mountain had the strength to destroy the Forbidden Insect King, it would be enough to prove that Black Wind Mountain's strength surpassed their Heavenly Emperor Palace, which was not a good thing.

Although the Heavenly Emperor Palace has hole cards, some hole cards cannot be easily moved, otherwise the Heavenly Emperor Palace will lose its dominant position and will no longer be able to deter other forces.

These palace masters discussed for a long time, but they didn't have a countermeasure, so they could only try to investigate this matter.

At the same time, they also needed to use the many treasures they had obtained from the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle to improve their strength, and try to add a few more half-step domain ancestors of the Ten Thousand Realms to the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

----------------

The other side.

Ye Tian returned to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm Human Realm, and now the matter of the Forbidden Zerg is over, although he doesn't know what happened to the Forbidden Insect King, he doesn't care too much.

In short, he doesn't need to enter the Dark Forbidden Domain to hunt the Forbidden Zerg anymore, and he can improve his strength with peace of mind.

Ye Tian fused the three forbidden talents copied from the insect king one by one, the forbidden talents: the dark spear and the forbidden talent: purple armor is not too precious to Ye Tian, after all, he already has a forbidden talent;

However, the Forbidden Talent: Perception is relatively rare, and this is the first time he has copied the Forbidden Talent of the Perception class.

After the fusion, Ye Tiancai knew how powerful the Perception Forbidden Talent was.

For example, if someone has a forbidden talent of invisibility, he can use the perception forbidden talent to perceive the existence of the other party.

Even Ouyang Jiu'er cast the Shadowless Divine Step, he could use his perceptual talent to perceive the existence of the other party.

With the perceptual taboo talent, Ye Tian can be regarded as making up for his shortcomings in this aspect, and he is no longer afraid of others sneaking up on him.

Next, Ye Tian concentrated on improving his cultivation and comprehending the Endless Dao.

With the passage of time, not long after, Ye Tian's cultivation was promoted to the extreme of the strongest Dao Ancestor, and the power of the physical body, the forbidden Dao power, and the soul power had all reached the limit, if he did not enter the realm of the invincible Dao Ancestor, his cultivation would not be able to improve by half a step.

In addition, Ye Tian's Forbidden Dao Technique was basically in a state of stagnation, unless he went to comprehend the Eternal Source Stone Statue again, there was no way to quickly improve the attainment of the Forbidden Dao Technique, and it would take a long time to progress.

Of course, the so-called stagnation was for Ye Tian's previous progress, and for others and even for the half-step domain ancestors, Ye Tian's forbidden dao technique improvement speed was also extremely fast, far exceeding the improvement of other half-step domain ancestors.

In the following days, Ye Tian occasionally entered the Enlightenment Pagoda of the Wind Mountain, went to comprehend the Eternal Source Stone Statue, occasionally returned to the human realm to retreat and cultivate, and occasionally instructed and cultivated the Dao ancestors of the human race.

In this way, 550,000 years passed.
